understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character through the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile ('+') without landing on spike hazards ('u'/'v'), using a limited number of turns/steps per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or CLICK (or UNDO). After any horizontal move, gravity (in this case DOWN) automatically carries the character along that direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w or other solid), reach the goal, or hit a hazard (spikes cause immediate loss). CLICK targets a specific coordinate to interact with clickable tiles such as breakable blocks ('x'), removing them to open new fall paths; clicking does not move the player. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click.
